name: widget_duplicate_unique_name
description: List-only fixture for duplicating a widget with a requested name collision; C++ automation covers unique-name generation and binding-preservation helper behavior.
expectationNote: Deep binding survival after duplicate requires a pre-staged Widget Blueprint with delegate bindings; C++ automation covers collision-safe names and the required contract is recorded here.

expectedContract.precondition: Create /Game/__UEvolveMcpTest/Widget/WBP_BindingSmoke with BoundButton and an OnClicked binding.
expectedContract.postcheck: Call unreal.widget_dump_tree after duplicate and verify the original BoundButton binding still resolves.
